title: Senior Teacher - Narayana Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Narayana Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Senior Teacher in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
